title: 4.5 Inch Saucer Christmas Crackers Pack of 16 in Gold and Silver Designs Luxury Mini Table Crackers with Decorative Bows Perfect for Festive Dining Parties
features: Designed at a compact 4.5-inch length, these saucer crackers provide an elegant miniature alternative to traditional crackers, making them perfect for side plates, canapés, afternoon teas, or more refined dining displays without overwhelming your table layout.

Each set includes eight beautifully coordinated crackers crafted from high-quality printed board, offering both durability and premium presentation to elevate any festive gathering, holiday party or seasonal celebration.

Available in two stunning colour themes—luxurious gold with botanical detailing and shimmering bows, and wintery silver with soft foliage motifs—these crackers complement a wide range of Christmas décor styles from modern minimalist to classic traditional.

Despite their small size, each cracker is carefully embellished with decorative bows and detailed print designs, giving your dining table a thoughtfully curated, high-end festive look that enhances your guests’ overall experience.

Ideal for family dinners, Christmas parties, commercial venues or festive events, these 4.5-inch saucer crackers offer effortless versatility and timeless charm, making them a beautiful finishing touch that adds seasonal sparkle to any occasion.
description: Bring elegance, charm and a touch of festive tradition to your Christmas table with this beautiful set of 4.5-inch Saucer Crackers. Designed especially for placing on side plates or saucers, these miniature crackers offer all the festive appeal of classic full-size crackers but in a compact, refined format perfect for intimate dining settings, canapé platters, afternoon teas, or sophisticated table layouts. Each retail box contains eight exquisitely coordinated crackers, presented in two stunning colour themes to suit a range of Christmas décor styles. The gold set features warm metallic tones combined with graceful botanical patterns and delicate star motifs, finished with shimmering gold bows for a luxurious, celebratory feel. The silver set offers a crisp winter aesthetic, combining icy metallic silver, soft white accents, subtle seasonal foliage, and beautifully textured bows that bring a frosty, elegant finish to your festive display. Despite their petite 4.5-inch size, these saucer crackers are crafted with premium printed board and beautifully assembled embellishments, ensuring they not only look exquisite on the table but also add a special moment of festive excitement for every guest. Ideal for family gatherings, holiday parties, restaurant service, corporate events and seasonal celebrations, they blend beautifully into traditional, modern or minimalist décor themes. Whether you are styling a lavish table or adding a charming finishing touch to festive entertaining, these Saucer Crackers deliver exceptional presentation and timeless Christmas appeal in a small but perfectly formed design.
